## Arista Networks Named an AI Infrastructure Pick Alongside Two Other Stocks

Continued thematic inclusion of ANET in AI infrastructure baskets signals persistent buy-side awareness of its networking exposure; monitor for whether this coverage precedes institutional position-building or remains retail noise.

- SimplyWallSt highlights ANET as one of three AI infrastructure investment candidates.
- No hard catalyst cited; framed as a thematic positioning or watchlist piece.
- The other two names are not identified in the headline.
- Confidence is medium; thematic coverage, not earnings or contract news.
